data.four_set_effect: For each different element present in your own party, the wearer's Elemental RES to that corresponding element is increased by 30%.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A fabric band dyed indigo by the darkness of night. Can also double as a bandage in the event of an emergency.
circlet_of_logos.title: Guardian's Band

flower_of_life.desc: An iris that was cherished by the guardian. Unfortunately, the chance never came for it to be given to whom the guardian loved.
flower_of_life.title: Guardian's Flower

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A metal vessel that can be filled with a drink to dispel the loneliness of the long watch.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Guardian's Vessel

plume_of_death.desc: A feather-shaped brooch that symbolizes someone’s yearning to defend others like a shield.
plume_of_death.title: Guardian's Sigil

sands_of_eon.desc: A small timekeeping gadget. On moonless nights, it was the only way its former owner could know the time.
sands_of_eon.title: Guardian's Clock

list.desc: Only that maiden's clear voice,</br>Could cause the guardian's brow to come unbound.</br>Their time together was short.</br>At last, the knight's blood would run dry,</br>As would her tears and her songs.</br>
list.title: Guardian's Flower

list.desc: Always have a backup plan—</br>He wore this headband to remind himself of that axiom.</br>In an emergency, it could also serve as a tourniquet.</br>By this creed he taught his swordsmanship to the knights under his friend's command.</br>By this credo he also mentored a white knight who loved justice above all else.</br>In its name he nipped many seedlings that might have blossomed into evil in the bud.</br>As long as he was sufficiently prepared,</br>Even if one day, he should be unable to defend this land,</br>Or protect his friend, or that maiden who loved to sing...</br>
list.title: Guardian's Band

list.desc: An exceedingly ordinary old wine canteen.</br>If one had to point out something special about it,</br>It would be that it never once contained a drop of alcohol.</br>"Come on, you have to try a little wine sometime."</br>The guardian's longtime friend and superior joked.</br>"Quit knitting those eyebrows together, have a little wine and song!"</br>"I mean, that's how we have the courage to face tomorrow."</br>
list.title: Guardian's Vessel

list.desc: The shield-crest engraved upon this quill glitters in the pale moonlight.</br>Long ago, this light would strike fear into the hearts of evildoers and thieves.</br>The guardian had a very precious knightly title.</br>But at night, he would disguise his crest and face beneath a mantle.</br>Thus, he could shake off his restraints and do that which needed to be done—</br>—Yet could not be done by an upright knight in good standing.</br>
list.title: Guardian's Sigil

list.desc: The ticking of the clock's hands, the candlelight, and the reams of case notes,</br>The shadows by moonlight, the blade and black mantle,</br>These were the constant companions of the lonesome guardian.</br>But no matter how far he went, there was never enough time.</br>His superior, carefree and proud, often laughed at his curtness, his unsmiling face, his aversion to fun.</br>But the guardian was not one to look back on the past — only to the present and future.</br>Only by reaving every last trace of evil, no matter the means,</br>Could he ensure that this land that his friend and superior loved could have a future without fear.</br>Only when he gazed on that maiden in the square,</br>Could he think upon things he had no time for.</br>Only then could he think about his own future...</br>
list.title: Guardian's Clock
